name: Atlas Copco AB
description: Atlas Copco AB is a Swedish multinational industrial company that provides sustainable productivity solutions. The Group offers innovative compressors, vacuum solutions, generators, pumps, power tools, and assembly systems. Founded in 1873 and headquartered in Nacka, Sweden, the company serves customers in more than 180 countries. Its products and services focus on productivity, energy efficiency, safety, and ergonomics, supporting various industries including manufacturing, construction, and process industries worldwide.
